rows.notes: Section 321 commercial de minimis terminated by Executive Order effective August 29, 2025. All commercial shipments now require formal customs entry regardless of value — MFN duty, MPF, and HMF apply. Personal-use and bona-fide gift exemptions may still apply per CBP discretion but are not commercial e-commerce eligible.
Post-Brexit: under £135 VAT is collected at point of sale by the seller (OMP rules). Customs duty waived under £135. No de-minimis for VAT — applies from £0.
IOSS scheme since 2021: VAT collected at sale for shipments under €150. Duty exempt under €150.
Default $20 CAD threshold. CUSMA-origin from US/Mexico: $150 duty / $40 tax thresholds.
Duty exempt under $1000 AUD; GST applies to all imports since July 2018 regardless of value.
Duty exempt under $1000 NZD. GST collected at sale by offshore suppliers with > $60k NZD revenue.
VAT under 5 CHF effectively waived (de-minimis tax). Exemption tied to total VAT amount, not value.
VOEC scheme replaced 350 NOK threshold for VAT in 2020 — VAT now collected at sale by registered foreign sellers.
Air/post imports under $400 SGD GST-exempt. GST 9% from 2024 above threshold.
Customs value (60% of retail) under ¥10,000 exempt from duty + consumption tax.
Personal import under $150 USD ($200 USD for goods from US under KORUS) exempt from duty/VAT.
Mexico SAT — courier informal entry under USD 50, simplified USD 50–1000. Above: formal entry.
Brazil Receita Federal Remessa Conforme — USD 50 duty-free (since 2024-08; was USD 10 pre-2024). Above: 17% MCO + ICMS.
India Customs CIER — INR ~5000 gift, USD 100 commercial samples threshold. Above: IGST + BCD + AIDC.
UAE Federal Customs — AED 1000 (~USD 272) personal duty-free. Commercial: 5% customs + 5% VAT.
Saudi Arabia ZATCA — SAR 1000 (~USD 266) personal courier. Commercial: 5% customs + 15% VAT.
Indonesia DJBC — USD 3 commercial e-commerce duty/VAT threshold. One of the lowest globally.
Malaysia Royal Customs — MYR 500 (~USD 119) commercial threshold. Above: SST + duty.
Thailand Customs — THB 1500 (~USD 42) gift / commercial threshold. Above: 7% VAT + duty.
Vietnam GDC — VND 1,000,000 (~USD 41) duty/VAT threshold. Above: 10% VAT + duty.
Philippines BOC — PHP 10,000 (~USD 180) duty-free. Above: 12% VAT + duty.
South Africa SARS — ZAR 500 (~USD 29) duty-free informal entry. Above: 15% VAT + duty.
Türkiye Ministry of Trade — EUR 30 (~USD 33) duty-free threshold. Above: 20% VAT + duty.
Hong Kong is a free port — no customs duty on imports. Excise items only (tobacco/alcohol/fuel).
Israel — USD 75 personal use de-minimis. Above: 17% VAT + duty + purchase tax (varies).
Iceland — VSK applies from first ISK; small consignment relief under EUR 22 historically but tightened.
Russia EAEU — EUR 200 / 31kg duty-free personal threshold since 2022; commercial e-com 15% + EUR 2/kg above.
Ukraine — EUR 150 personal courier duty-free; VAT 20% + duty above.
Belarus EAEU member — same EUR 200 threshold as Russia.
Kazakhstan EAEU member — EUR 200 / 31kg threshold; VAT 12% + duty above.
Georgia — GEL 300 (~USD 110) duty-free personal threshold.
Armenia EAEU member — EUR 200 personal threshold.
Azerbaijan — USD 300 (international post and courier) duty-free threshold.
Moldova — EUR 200 personal threshold; VAT 20% above.
Albania — EUR 22 low-value threshold; VAT 20% above.
North Macedonia — EUR 22 low-value threshold.
Bosnia and Herzegovina — BAM 300 (~USD 165) personal threshold.
Serbia — EUR 70 personal threshold (raised from EUR 50 in 2023).
Egypt — USD 150 personal courier threshold; VAT 14% + duty above.
Morocco — MAD 1250 (~USD 125) personal threshold; VAT 20% + duty above.
Tunisia — TND 1000 (~USD 320) personal threshold; VAT 19% + duty above.
Algeria — no commercial de-minimis; all imports require declaration.
Jordan — USD 150 personal threshold; GST 16% + duty above.
Lebanon — USD 100 personal threshold; VAT 11% + duty above.
Qatar — QAR 3000 (~USD 824) personal courier threshold; customs 5% above.
Kuwait — KWD 100 (~USD 326) personal threshold; customs 5% above.
Oman — OMR 100 (~USD 260) personal threshold; customs 5% + VAT 5% above.
Bahrain — BHD 300 (~USD 795) personal threshold; customs 5% + VAT 10% above.
Nigeria — no formal de-minimis; all commercial imports require declaration. VAT 7.5% + duty.
Kenya — KES 5000 (~USD 35) personal threshold; VAT 16% + duty above.
Ethiopia — no de-minimis; all imports declared. VAT 15% + duty.
Ghana — no formal de-minimis; commercial imports declared. VAT 15% + duty.
Tanzania — USD 100 personal threshold for postal imports. VAT 18% above.
Uganda — USD 30 personal courier threshold. VAT 18% + duty above.
Rwanda — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 18% + duty.
Zambia — no formal de-minimis. VAT 16% + duty.
Zimbabwe — no de-minimis; complex import regime. VAT 15% + duty.
Botswana SACU member — BWP 5000 (~USD 370) personal threshold.
Namibia SACU member — NAD 5000 (~USD 280) personal threshold.
Mozambique — no formal de-minimis. VAT 17% + duty.
Madagascar — no formal de-minimis. VAT 20% + duty.
Mauritius — no de-minimis. VAT 15% + duty.
Angola — no formal de-minimis. VAT 14% + duty.
Senegal WAEMU member — no de-minimis; CET 0–35% + VAT 18%.
Côte d'Ivoire WAEMU member — no de-minimis; CET + VAT 18%.
Cameroon CEMAC member — no de-minimis; CET + VAT 19.25%.
Argentina — USD 1000 personal threshold; Door-to-Door (Puerta a Puerta) scheme.
Chile — USD 30 duty-free threshold for postal/courier imports; VAT 19% + 6% duty above.
Colombia — USD 200 duty-free threshold (Trafico Postal). VAT 19% + duty above.
Peru — USD 200 personal courier threshold. VAT 18% + duty above.
Ecuador — USD 400 + 4kg category B duty-free threshold (4B). Above: 12% VAT + 5% Ad-Valorem.
Venezuela — complex import regime; effectively no de-minimis for commercial.
Bolivia — USD 1000 simplified import; VAT 13% + duty above.
Paraguay Tourism Regime — USD 1000 personal threshold.
Uruguay Reglamento Couriers — USD 200 / 20kg duty-free 3x per person/year.
Dominican Republic — USD 200 duty-free threshold; ITBIS 18% + duty above.
Costa Rica — USD 1000 personal courier threshold (Trafico Postal Internacional).
Panama — USD 100 commercial threshold; ITBMS 7% + duty above.
Guatemala — USD 500 personal courier threshold. IVA 12% + duty above.
Honduras — USD 200 personal threshold. ISV 15% + duty above.
El Salvador — USD 200 personal courier threshold. IVA 13% + duty above.
Nicaragua — USD 100 personal threshold. IVA 15% + duty above.
Jamaica — USD 50 personal threshold; GCT 15% + duty above.
Trinidad and Tobago — USD 20 personal threshold; VAT 12.5% + duty above.
Haiti — no formal de-minimis. All imports declared.
Bahamas — USD 100 personal threshold; VAT 10% + duty above.
Barbados — USD 20 personal threshold; VAT 17.5% + duty above.
Belize — USD 100 personal threshold; GST 12.5% + duty above.
Taiwan — TWD 2000 (~USD 63) duty-free postal threshold. Customs + VAT 5% above.
Pakistan — no formal de-minimis; complex import regime. GST 18% + duty.
Bangladesh — no de-minimis; gifts under BDT 5000 exempt. VAT 15% + duty.
Sri Lanka — USD 100 personal threshold; VAT 18% + duty above.
Nepal — no formal de-minimis. VAT 13% + duty.
Myanmar — no formal de-minimis. Commercial tax 5% + duty.
Cambodia — USD 50 personal threshold; VAT 10% + duty above.
Laos — USD 50 personal threshold; VAT 7% + duty above.
Mongolia — USD 300 personal courier threshold; VAT 10% + duty above.
Brunei — BND 400 (~USD 295) personal threshold; no VAT.
Macao SAR — free port; no customs duty except on tobacco/alcohol/fuel/vehicles.
Uzbekistan — USD 200 personal threshold; VAT 12% + duty above.
Kyrgyzstan EAEU member — EUR 200 personal threshold.
Fiji — FJD 400 (~USD 175) personal threshold; VAT 15% + duty above.
Papua New Guinea — PGK 250 (~USD 65) personal threshold; GST 10% + duty above.
Solomon Islands — no formal de-minimis. GST 10% + duty.
Vanuatu — no de-minimis. VAT 15% + duty.
Samoa — no de-minimis. VAGST 15% + duty.
Tonga — no de-minimis. Consumption Tax 15% + duty.
New Caledonia — XPF 20,000 (~USD 175) personal threshold; TGC 11% + duty above.
French Polynesia — XPF 20,000 (~USD 175) personal threshold; TVA 16% + duty above.

Cross-Border E-Commerce (CBEC) regime: single transaction ≤ RMB 5,000 AND annual per-person ≤ RMB 26,000 are exempt from import tariffs; VAT + consumption tax levied at 30% discount. Above either limit → must clear as general trade goods. Annual quota resets 1 January. Postal personal imports have a separate RMB 1,000 informal threshold via China Post.
Austria — EU IOSS: VAT (20% standard) collected at sale for shipments < €150. Duty exempt < €150. BMF customs portal handles enforcement.
Bulgaria — EU IOSS: VAT (20% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Cyprus — EU IOSS: VAT (19% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Czechia — EU IOSS: VAT (21% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Estonia — EU IOSS: VAT (22% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Finland — EU IOSS: VAT (25.5% standard from 2024-09) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Croatia — EU IOSS: VAT (25% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150. Eurozone member since 2023.
Hungary — EU IOSS: VAT (27% standard, EU's highest) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Lithuania — EU IOSS: VAT (21% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Latvia — EU IOSS: VAT (21% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Malta — EU IOSS: VAT (18% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Poland — EU IOSS: VAT (23% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Sweden — EU IOSS: VAT (25% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150. Not Eurozone (SEK).
Slovenia — EU IOSS: VAT (22% standard) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Slovakia — EU IOSS: VAT (23% standard from 2025-01) at sale for < €150. Duty exempt < €150.
Antigua and Barbuda — no commercial de-minimis. ABST (sales tax) 15% + CET duty from first dollar. Traveller personal exemption USD 50 not applicable to e-commerce.
Dominica — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 15% + CARICOM CET duty from first dollar.
Grenada — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 15% + CARICOM CET duty from first dollar.
St Kitts and Nevis — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 17% + CARICOM CET duty from first dollar.
St Lucia — no de-minimis: duty + 12.5% VAT always apply (per Zonos market guide, confirmed by SLU Customs). Personal allowance for travellers separate.
St Vincent and the Grenadines — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 16% + CARICOM CET duty from first dollar.
Suriname — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 10% (from 2023, replaced BTW) + CARICOM-aligned CET duty from first dollar.
Guyana — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 14% + CARICOM CET duty from first dollar.
Lesotho — SACU member, inherits ZA pattern: zero de-minimis. VAT 15% + SACU CET duty from first dollar.
Eswatini — SACU member, inherits ZA pattern: zero de-minimis. VAT 15% + SACU CET duty from first dollar.
Cabo Verde — no commercial de-minimis. IVA 15% + duty from first escudo. Goods declared via DGCI.
Seychelles — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 15% + duty from first rupee. SRC handles enforcement.
Djibouti — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 10% + duty from first franc.
Eritrea — no commercial de-minimis; all imports require declaration. Import restrictions extensive per Ministry of Trade and Industry.
Gambia — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 15% + ECOWAS CET duty from first dalasi. GRA handles enforcement.
Guinea-Bissau — UEMOA + ECOWAS member. No commercial de-minimis. VAT/duty from first franc via Direção-Geral das Alfândegas.
Comoros — no commercial de-minimis. Consumption tax + duty applied via AGID (general administration of taxes).
Liberia — no commercial de-minimis. GST 10% + ECOWAS CET duty from first dollar. LRA handles enforcement.
Malawi — no commercial de-minimis. VAT 16.5% + duty from first kwacha via MRA.
Sierra Leone — no commercial de-minimis. GST 15% + ECOWAS CET duty from first leone via NRA.
São Tomé and Príncipe — no commercial de-minimis. VAT (from 2023) + duty from first dobra via AGT customs administration.
Andorra — not in EU customs union but has special customs arrangement. General Indirect Tax (IGI) 4.5%. No commercial de-minimis for imports; declaration required from EUR 0.
Monaco — in EU customs territory via France. EU de-minimis applies (€150 duty / €0 VAT under IOSS). VAT 20% French standard.
San Marino — customs union with EU since 1991. Imports from outside EU+SM subject to Italian customs treatment; from EU subject to SM monophasic tax. No e-commerce de-minimis distinct from EU rules.
Vatican City — sovereign territory inside Italy. Effectively rides Italian customs for any commercial flow; no published commercial de-minimis. Verified absent.

Liechtenstein — Swiss customs union. Applies Swiss thresholds: VAT collected when amount < CHF 5 (i.e. when value × 8.1% < CHF 5 → goods value under ~CHF 62). No duty de-minimis distinct from Switzerland.
Gibraltar — outside EU customs union since Brexit. No VAT (uses Import Duty regime); commercial de-minimis not published as a single threshold. Customs declaration required.
Faroe Islands — outside EU customs territory despite Danish realm. VAT (MVG) 25%; e-commerce de-minimis DKK 300 for VAT.
Greenland — outside EU customs territory. Duty + import surcharge from first krone; no general de-minimis. Skattestyrelsen administers.
Kiribati — no commercial de-minimis. Customs and excise duty from first AUD per Customs Act 2005.
Federated States of Micronesia — Compact of Free Association with US. Commercial de-minimis not separately published.
Marshall Islands — Compact of Free Association with US. Import duty regime; no published e-commerce de-minimis.
Palau — Compact of Free Association with US. Customs duty + import tax; no e-commerce de-minimis published.
Nauru — small-state customs regime; no published commercial de-minimis.
Tuvalu — small-state customs; no published commercial de-minimis.
Cook Islands — self-governing in free association with NZ. VAT 15% from first NZD; duty regime separate.
Niue — self-governing in free association with NZ. Small-island customs regime; no published commercial de-minimis.
Benin — ECOWAS CET + VAT 18% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis. DGDDI administers.
Burkina Faso — UEMOA + ECOWAS CET. VAT 18% + duty from first franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Burundi — EAC CET + VAT 18% from first franc. No commercial de-minimis. OBR administers.
Democratic Republic of the Congo — VAT 16% + duty from first franc congolais. No commercial de-minimis. DGDA administers.
Republic of the Congo — CEMAC CET + VAT 18% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Central African Republic — CEMAC CET + VAT 19% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Gabon — CEMAC CET + VAT 18% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis. DGDDI administers.
Guinea — ECOWAS CET + VAT 18% from first GNF. No commercial de-minimis. DGD administers.
Equatorial Guinea — CEMAC CET + VAT 15% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Mali — UEMOA + ECOWAS CET. VAT 18% + duty from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Mauritania — TEC ouguiya + VAT 16% from first UM. No commercial de-minimis. DGD administers.
Niger — UEMOA + ECOWAS CET. VAT 19% + duty from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Sudan — sanctions-affected customs regime (US sanctions partially eased 2017, conflict-disrupted since 2023). VAT 17% + duty nominally apply from first SDG.
South Sudan — EAC observer; customs in development. Duty + VAT from first SSP. No published de-minimis.
Somalia — customs administration limited outside Mogadishu. No published commercial de-minimis.
Chad — CEMAC CET + VAT 18% from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis.
Togo — UEMOA + ECOWAS CET. VAT 18% + duty from first CFA franc. No commercial de-minimis. OTR administers.
Iraq — General Commission of Customs. Duty + sales tax from first IQD; reconstruction-tax surcharge 5%. No published e-commerce de-minimis.
Yemen — customs administration divided between de facto authorities; no consistent published de-minimis.
Syria — sanctions-affected customs. No reliable published commercial de-minimis.
Palestinian territories — customs revenue collected by Israel under Paris Protocol. Imports follow Israeli tariff schedules; ILS de-minimis applies in practice.
Libya — duty + custom service fee from first LYD. No published e-commerce de-minimis.
Afghanistan — customs administration unstable since 2021. No reliable published de-minimis.
Tajikistan — CSTO member, observer to EAEU. De-minimis USD 200 / 5kg per shipment for personal-use mail order; commercial subject to full tariff.
Turkmenistan — personal-use mail-order de-minimis USD 200; commercial shipments from first manat via Turkmen Customs Service.
Serbia — €70 customs duty de-minimis for personal-use postal/courier shipments; VAT 20% applies separately. Commercial: full duty + VAT.
Montenegro — €75 customs duty de-minimis for personal-use postal shipments; VAT 21% applies separately.
Kosovo — €22 customs de-minimis for personal-use postal shipments; commercial subject to full duty + VAT 18%.
Aruba — kingdom-of-Netherlands constituent country with own customs. Import duty + BBO turnover tax from first florin.
Curaçao — kingdom-of-Netherlands constituent country. Import duty + OB sales tax from first guilder.
Sint Maarten — kingdom-of-Netherlands constituent country. Import duty + TOT sales tax from first guilder.
Puerto Rico — US customs territory; pre-EO-2025 Section 321 de-minimis applied. As of 2025-08-29 Section 321 terminated; commercial shipments subject to formal entry from first dollar.
Cuba — US sanctioned. Commercial e-commerce with Cuba is restricted under OFAC CACR 31 CFR 515. No relevant de-minimis for US-origin trade.
Bhutan — sales tax (GST 7%) + duty from first ngultrum. No commercial de-minimis. Department of Revenue & Customs.
Maldives — MVR 1,000 personal-use postal de-minimis (~USD 65). Commercial: import duty from first rufiyaa.
Timor-Leste — import duty 2.5% (general) or 5%-200% (specific HS) + sales tax 2.5% from first USD. No commercial de-minimis.
Romania — EU member, follows IOSS de-minimis (€150 duty / €0 VAT under IOSS) per EU rules.
